overview.value: Spider Plant forms arching striped leaves and baby plantlets on long stems. It is adaptable, fast-growing, and simple to propagate.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Spider Plant","overview":"Spider Plant forms arching striped leaves and baby plantlets on long stems. It is adaptable, fast-growing, and simple to propagate.","tips":"Plantlets can be rooted while still attached or clipped and rooted separately."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"吊兰","overview":"吊兰会长出拱形条纹叶片，并在长茎上形成小植株。它适应性强、生长快，也很容易繁殖。","tips":"小吊兰可以连在母株上生根，也可以剪下后单独扦插。"}}
